metadata.description: A curated collection of skills for AI coding agents.

plugins.name: document-search
plugins.description: Search a folder for a term and return a ranked list of files that contain it — including inside .docx, .pptx, .xlsx, and .pdf documents where ordinary grep/rg are blind.

plugins.name: document-readers
plugins.description: Read text content from a single PDF, Word, Excel, or PowerPoint document. Four companion skills (pdf-reader, docx-reader, xlsx-reader, pptx-reader) — install together for full Office/PDF reading support.
